tasks.title: Disable structlog Rich-traceback show_locals globally to prevent DSN/secret leaks in error logs
acceptance: 1) app/core/logging.py configures structlog's traceback formatter with show_locals=False (or installs a frame-locals redaction processor that scrubs keys matching password|pwd|token|secret|api_key|encrypted_secret|dsn|database_url|connection_string and values matching DSN-like substrings). 2) New test in backend/tests/test_logging.py exercises a real exception with sensitive locals (e.g. asyncpg auth failure with a fake DSN) and asserts that the rendered log line does NOT contain the secret value, the host, the port, the user, or the password key value. 3) ENABLE_VERBOSE_LOGGING toggle still works correctly. 4) ruff + mypy clean. 5) Regression: existing 8 health tests + 39 dep-smoke tests still pass. 6) Existing /ready 503 path continues to log error_class + db_detail (sanitized) without exc_info=True OR with a configuration that no longer leaks.
verification_commands: Real reproduction: launch uvicorn with bad DATABASE_URL (port without listener), curl /ready, grep stdout for 'password', 'pwd', the actual password value, host, port — all must be absent. Run with both ENABLE_VERBOSE_LOGGING=true and =false. Also reproduce with a deliberate failing path elsewhere (any other use case that catches an exception and logs with exc_info=True). Capture logs in evidence dir.
tasks.target: Disable structlog Rich-traceback show_locals globally to prevent DSN/secret leaks in error logs
tasks.target_raw: Disable structlog Rich-traceback show_locals globally to prevent DSN/secret leaks in error logs

notes: Description: POST /api/v1/admin/ai/providers/{id}/discover-models calls the provider's models endpoint and reconciles against ai_models; returns the diff of new vs existing models with auto_discovered=true on new rows. Required by ADR-001 and the AdminAiModelsPage discover wizard (FU-X2).

tasks.title: Dev .env missing valid ENCRYPTION_KEY (has legacy PROVIDER_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dev-encryption-key-placeholder)
acceptance: fresh dev clone after running setup-from-scratch.sh has a valid Fernet ENCRYPTION_KEY in .env (or generated dynamically)
bootstrap_verification_data succeeds without manual export
live discover-models endpoint encrypt/decrypt works first try
verification_commands: bash scripts/dev-restart.sh --reset succeeds without ENCRYPTION_KEY warning
curl POST /api/v1/admin/ai/providers/<id>/discover-models with seeded prod-like data returns 200 (not 502 CryptoError)
notes: Description: P01-S01-T002 renamed PROVIDER_ENCRYPTION_KEY → ENCRYPTION_KEY in .env.example and config.py but the actual dev .env was never updated and still carries the legacy name with the placeholder string 'dev-encryption-key-placeholder' which is NOT a valid Fernet base64 key. Two real failures observed during /verify-slice P00-S02-T006: (a) bootstrap_verification_data --only auth fails immediately with 'ENCRYPTION_KEY env var is required for MFA TOTP encryption' and the dev-restart.sh wrapper warns but continues, leaving auth (and admin_ai) un-seeded; (b) any live POST /api/v1/admin/ai/providers/{id}/discover-models returns 502 CryptoError because Fernet construction with an invalid base64 key fails on first decrypt. Both were observed live with hard reset. Mitigation during verify was an exported Fernet key for that single shell. Persistent fix: update dev .env + setup-from-scratch.sh to generate or carry a real Fernet key under the canonical name.

tasks.title: Fix admin_ai seed loader: column api_key does not exist in ai_providers (should use ai_provider_credentials)
acceptance: python -m app.seeds.bootstrap_verification_data --source data/verification --only admin_ai exits 0 with upsert success log (no ProgrammingError)
verification_commands: Run seed loader with real DB and admin_ai tables present → SELECT count(*) FROM ai_providers returns >= 1
notes: Description: The seed loader (backend/app/seeds/loader.py:load_admin_ai) tries to INSERT api_key into ai_providers, but that column does not exist after T006 migration. The T006 migration correctly stores credentials in ai_provider_credentials.encrypted_secret (Fernet-encrypted). The seed loader needs to be updated to: (1) INSERT the provider row into ai_providers, (2) Fernet-encrypt the api_key_env value, (3) INSERT the credential into ai_provider_credentials. This is a seed data wiring fix, not a schema change.

tasks.title: Suppress httpx logger to prevent Gemini API key leak in verbose logs
acceptance: grep -E 'AIza|sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{20}' verbose_logs.txt returns 0 matches when ENABLE_VERBOSE_LOGGING=true and endpoint makes a real Gemini API call
notes: Description: When ENABLE_VERBOSE_LOGGING=true, the httpx library emits INFO-level logs of HTTP requests including the full URL. For GeminiDirectClient, the URL contains the api_key as a query param (?key=AIza...). The app code uses _safe_base_url() to strip this from app-level logs, but httpx's own transport logger bypasses it. Fix: set logging.getLogger('httpx').setLevel(logging.WARNING) in configure_logging() when verbose=False (already correct since root is WARNING) and also when verbose=True (add explicit httpx logger suppression). Alternatively, configure httpx event hooks to scrub the key from request logs.

tasks.title: Fix .env DATABASE_URL host port + pydantic env_file path resolution for native dev workflow
acceptance: (1) DATABASE_URL host:port aligned to hilo-postgres exposure (localhost:5433 for native dev or postgres:5432 for compose), .env.example documents both modes clearly. (2) Settings env_file resolves robustly regardless of cwd (e.g. absolute path resolution from the project root, or env_file as a list with project-root anchor, or pydantic-settings model_config.env_file with explicit Path). (3) Cold-boot native uvicorn from project root + native pytest from cd backend/ both report /ready 200 against hilo-postgres. (4) dev-restart.sh --reset succeeds end-to-end on a clean checkout. (5) test_ready_returns_200_when_db_ok turns from FAIL to PASS without any test-side change.
verification_commands: Run from a fresh shell with no env vars set: 1) bash scripts/dev-restart.sh --reset succeeds. 2) cd backend && pytest tests/test_health.py::test_ready_returns_200_when_db_ok passes. 3) Cold-boot uvicorn from project root: curl /ready returns 200 with checks.db.status=ok. 4) Run pytest from project root AND cd backend/ — Settings.database_url loaded with the right credentials in both cases.
tasks.target: Fix .env DATABASE_URL host port + pydantic env_file path resolution for native dev workflow
tasks.target_raw: Fix .env DATABASE_URL host port + pydantic env_file path resolution for native dev workflow
